title: "Reopen" or "Revert" a completed sprint
excerpt: I clicked on the ‘Completed’ button for a sprint by mistake, and I want to undo this action. How can I do that?

posts.author: ManalBenchrif (Manal)
posts.cookedHtml: I clicked on the ‘Completed’ button for a sprint by mistake, and I want to undo this action. How can I do that?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You may want to post this in monday dev - monday Community Forum as well.

But I to would like to know if this is possible - but so far I do not think it is.
